description_long: This is a mid-sized pickup truck with a double cab and a visible cargo bed at the rear. The body is primarily a weathered red with patches of gray, suggesting age or exposure to the elements. The truck features four doors, blacked-out windows, and a robust front grille with a blue badge, hinting at a Ford design. The wheels are large and rugged, suitable for both urban and off-road environments, though the front wheels appear slightly misaligned. The cargo bed is open and spacious, with a tailgate at the back and wheel wells protruding into the bed area. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on practicality and durability for transporting goods or passengers in urban settings.
description: A weathered red and gray double-cab pickup truck with a spacious cargo bed and rugged wheels, featuring a blue-badged grille and four doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the double cab, four doors, and the open cargo bed with visible wheel wells.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the grille with a blue badge, blacked-out windshield, and slightly misaligned front wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same double cab and cargo bed, with clearer visibility of the rear wheel and bed details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, and the back window of the cab.
